name: Nanjing Chervon Auto Precision Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Nanjing Chervon Auto Precision Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of automotive components. The company offers engine parts, such as sprocket and throttle parts; compressor parts, including swashplates and air conditioning compressor housings; transmission products comprising valve body, shift housing, hub, and gearbox hub products; new energy products that include electric motor shafts and electric vehicle motor assemblies; and steering and brake parts for use in high-end cars. It also provides gloss panels, outlets, drum tripods, drying out the air ducts, panel linings, and panels for washing machines; gears for agricultural machinery; valve lifters, pull rod heads, left and right taps, and hook up products for use in high-speed rails; and other parts. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Nanjing, China.
